end end V=#D return l(K)end,{},function(h,E)local l=w(E)local G=function()return V(h,{},E,l)end return G end,function()T=(-709837-(-709838))+T a[T]=608032+-608031 return T end,function(h,E)local l=w(E)local G=function(G,c,D,p,K,P)return V(h,{G;c;D,p;K,P},E,l)end return G end return(t(565631+13869308,{}))(l(K))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[E(775529-752967)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
